meta.description: A Discord bot that automatically completes quests — secure, parallel, zero token exposure.

hero.title: Complete Discord Quests
hero.subtitle: A bot that handles every Discord quest for you — in parallel, in real-time, with zero token exposure.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Built for reliability, security, and speed.
features.parallel_desc: Run up to 6 PLAY_* quests simultaneously with isolated threads.
features.security_desc: AES-256-GCM encryption with per-user derived keys. Your token never touches a log.
features.auto_desc: Smart scheduler checks for new quests and DMs you the results automatically.
features.live_desc: One message, updated in real-time — no spam, no noise.
features.hidden_desc: Ephemeral commands + masked display. Token is never visible to anyone.
features.stats_desc: Full dashboard per token — quests done, pending, last run, next scheduled.
features.multi_desc: WATCH_VIDEO · PLAY_ON_DESKTOP · STREAM · PLAY_ACTIVITY — all supported.
features.recovery_desc: Interrupted sessions resume automatically. No quest is ever lost.
features.oss_desc: 100% public source code. Audit it, fork it, self-host it.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: From command to reward in 5 steps.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Invite the bot to your server or send /quests directly.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Bot retrieves all available quests from Discord API.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Enrolls in every eligible quest and begins parallel completion.
how_it_works.step4_desc: A single message updates in real-time with progress bars.
how_it_works.step5_desc: Quest completed — rewards delivered to your account.

security.title: Security & Transparency
security.subtitle: We publish what we do. You can verify every claim.
security.commit2: Unique key derived per Discord user ID
security.commit3: Token never written to any log
security.selfhost: Don't trust us? Host it yourself.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Does the bot store my token?
faq.a1: Only if you use /autoquests. The token is encrypted with AES-256-GCM using a key derived from your Discord user ID before being stored. With /quests (one-time mode), nothing is written to disk.
faq.a2: The bot mimics normal Discord client behavior using legitimate API endpoints. However, any automation carries inherent risk. Use at your own discretion.
faq.a4: Yes. The full source is on GitHub with a detailed self-host guide. Docker support included.
faq.a5: Run /autoquests remove at any time. Your token and all associated stats are permanently deleted.
faq.a6: Yes, completely free. No premium tier, no hidden fees.
faq.q7: How do I report a bug?
faq.a7: Open an issue on GitHub or send a message in the #bug-report channel on our Discord server.

footer.tagline: Automate your quests. Keep your token safe.
footer.made_by: Made by @htch9999 · Open Source · MIT License
footer.disclaimer: This project is not affiliated with Discord Inc.
